# Contributing to Balinese Calendar

> **📚 This document has moved to our documentation site!**

For the complete contributing guide, please visit:

**[https://sha888.github.io/balinese-calendar/development/contributing.html](https://sha888.github.io/balinese-calendar/development/contributing.html)**

## Quick Links

- **[Development Setup](https://sha888.github.io/balinese-calendar/development/setup.html)** - Get your development environment ready
- **[Testing Guide](https://sha888.github.io/balinese-calendar/development/testing.html)** - Learn about our testing practices
- **[Code Style](https://sha888.github.io/balinese-calendar/development/code-style.html)** - Follow our coding standards
- **[Pull Request Template](./PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md)** - Use our PR template

## Quick Start for Contributors

1. Fork the repository
2. Clone your fork: `git clone https://github.com/your-username/balinese-calendar.git`
3. Create a branch: `git checkout -b feature/your-feature`
4. Make your changes following our [coding standards](https://sha888.github.io/balinese-calendar/development/code-style.html)
5. Run tests: `cargo test --all-features`
6. Submit a pull request
